case_title: WALL COMPANY VS MONETTA, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,025.72 FILED BY WALL COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MONETTA, ROBERT MONETTA, NATALIE MONETTA, ROBERT, DR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MONETTA, ROBERT

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALL COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONETTA, ROBERT MONETTA, NATALIE MONETTA, ROBERT, DR. $625.72 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $645.72, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MONETTA, ROBERT MONETTA, NATALIE MONETTA, ROBERT, DR.
